Polyple

Polyple is an interactive N-dimensional geometry editor for building, transforming, animating, and rendering high-dimensional objects through 3D projection.

Controls

  • Orbit: left drag. Zoom: wheel.
  • Shift axes button: click the axis cycle button to shift which dimensions are projected as X/Y/Z.
  • Reset rotations button: reset extra-axis rotations without stopping active auto-rotation.
  • Perspective depth: use the depth button on an extra-axis gizmo to include/exclude that axis from perspective depth.
  • XYZ gizmo: drag the gizmo to move/orbit the view, or tap an endpoint to snap the camera to that axis.
  • Extra-axis gizmos: drag a gizmo to rotate through that extra dimension's projection plane.
  • Object origin: double click an object to focus the camera on its fixed origin. Use the object context menu to recalculate that origin from the current center of mass.
  • Axis auto-rotate: use the tiny play button on a gizmo to cycle 1x, 2x, 3x, then stop for that axis plane. Press P to play/pause active extra-axis rotations.
  • Axis order handles: drag the handle beside an extra-axis gizmo to reorder extra dimensions.
  • Axis swapping: drag an extra-axis gizmo over an XYZ tip to swap it with that projected axis.
  • Faceted mode: every object uses the same opaque multicolor material with one color per coplanar outer face region.
  • Keyframes: right click the timeline or viewport to insert a keyframe or remove the last keyframe. The timeline shows the current frame and keyframe markers.
  • Insert keyframe: press I at the current frame.
  • Remove keyframe: press U to remove the last keyframe at or before the current frame.
  • Animation playback: use the play button or Space to preview the keyframed animation.
  • Render controls: use the bottom mode box for wireframe/rendered/faceted, the timeline buttons for previous/play/next, and the Render tab for FPS, frame count, capture, quality, and effects.
  • Add object: Shift + A opens the primitive library.
  • Transform selected object: G move, R rotate, S scale.
  • Mobile transforms: tap Move/Rotate/Scale to toggle a mode, then drag the object gizmo handles to transform.
  • Delete selected object: X.
  • Edit mode: Tab. Use 1..8 or the small dimension buttons for vertex, edge, face, volume, and higher-cell selection, then G/R/S to transform the selected component. In face and higher-cell modes, click center dots for precision or repeated-click/Alt+click to cycle overlapping cells.
  • Undo/Redo: Ctrl/Cmd + Z, Ctrl/Cmd + Y.
  • Close this panel: close button, tap outside, or Esc.
